name: Vegetarian Barley-Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Frozen green beans or peas (chop to make 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the frozen green beans or peas into pieces to make 2 cups.
2. In a large kettle, sauté onions, carrots, and celery in heated butter or margarine for 5 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes, water, basil, thyme, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
4. Stir in barley and reduce heat. Cook slowly, covered, for 1 1/2 hours until the barley is tender.
5. During the last 10 minutes of cooking, stir in beans or peas.
6. Remove from heat and stir in dill.
7. Serves 10-12. Good for informal lunch or supper.
